# columns: name: # Cross-feature parser interactions. These tests prove combinations of language
# surfaces stay parseable together instead of only as isolated atoms.

purpose: Module, C include, and refinement declaration parse together.
source: (module Main)\n(include "math.h")\n(type Positive { x ∈ Int | (> x 0) })

purpose: C include, FFI-shaped call, and define parse together.

purpose: Layout where method desugars into a qualified method definition beside constructor use.
source:
module Main
layout Color
  [r :: U8]
  [g :: U8]
  [b :: U8]
  where
    method fromRGB :: U8 -> U8 -> U8 -> Color
      r g b -> (Color r g b)

define red Color 255 0 0
expected:
(module Main)
(layout Color [r :: U8] [g :: U8] [b :: U8])
(define Color.fromRGB (lambda ([r :: U8] [g :: U8] [b :: U8] -> Color) (Color r g b)))
(define red (Color 255 0 0))
